fixture.name: aragorn
notes: Local-only test fixture in the main checkout.
Not available in clean worktrees unless copied manually.

cases.goal: Use design review to find one strong improvement that makes Aragorn feel more cinematic while preserving his face, armor, sword, and horse, then export a PSD.
success_signals: proposal or edit is conservative and cinematic
exports only after a meaningful improvement
failure_signals: removes important foreground story elements without justification

cases.goal: Make this frame feel slightly more premium and readable by improving lighting and finish while keeping the same composition, then export a PSD.
Identify the most distracting local problem in the frame, mark or select it visibly on the canvas, improve it, then export a PNG.
success_signals: scope corresponds to a real problem area
failure_signals: edits immediately with no visible scoping
marks a low-value or random area

cases.goal: Preserve Aragorn as the clear hero, keep his face and sword hand intact, and create a cleaner left-side area that could hold title text, then export a PSD.
preconditions: human pre-places Make Space on the left side of the frame
failure_signals: subject is cropped or displaced badly

cases.goal: Improve the image while clearly centering the edit on the highlighted parts, then export a PSD.
preconditions: human pre-places Highlight over face, chest emblem, and sword hand
success_signals: the edit clearly targets the highlighted region first
the proposal stays centered on the highlighted content
failure_signals: the edit ignores the highlighted content
the proposal drifts away from the highlighted area

cases.goal: If you find a reusable cinematic polish pattern for this kind of hero frame, preview a tool for it, create the tool, then stop without exporting.
success_signals: tool description is specific and reusable
failure_signals: exports despite being told to stop
